Name: Reset Windows Update Cache
Description: Completely resets and rebuilds the Windows Update components and cache database.

Name: Reset Network Stack / IP
Description: Flushes and resets TCP/IP stack and Winsock catalog sockets configuration.

Name: Run SFC Scan
Description: Scans all protected operating system integrity files, correcting corruption.

Name: Run DISM Repair
Description: Repairs the system component store image via Windows Update downloads.

Name: Component Store Cleanup
Description: Purges old, superseded component updates from the WinSxS directory.

Name: Reset Windows Store
Description: Purges store caches and resets default package index (wsreset).

Name: Re-register UWP Apps
Description: PowerShell script that fully re-registers default Store apps (Photos, Calculator, Settings).

Name: Repair WMI Repository
Description: Salvages and rebuilds the Windows Management Instrumentation database.

Name: Re-register VSS DLLs
Description: Re-registers core backup volume shadow copy engine libraries.

Name: Repair Windows Firewall
Description: Flushes customized network policies and resets Microsoft Defender firewall.

Name: Reset Local Group Policies
Description: Restores registry policy settings and removes constraints placed by apps or malware.

Name: Flush/Register DNS
Description: Purges system caching index and registers active connection configurations.

Name: Clear Print Spooler Queue
Description: Forces stopping spooler and empties print caches to fix stuck printing queue.

Name: Fix LNK File Associations
Description: Clears override settings for .lnk files, restoring desktop shortcut behaviors.

Name: Rebuild Search Index
Description: Deletes database of the search engine, forcing a clean cache re-index.

Name: Repair MSI Engine
Description: Re-registers Microsoft Installer service system components.

Name: Restore Default hosts
Description: Restores system hosts index file, clearing malicious redirects/blocklists.

Name: Restore Default Services
Description: Enables core background system services that may have been disabled.

Name: Clear Shell Icon Cache
Description: Forces closing Explorer and cleans up icon and thumbnail database cache.

Name: Rebuild BCD (Boot Config)
Description: Rebuilds boot records and parameters index database. (Warning: Run in Recovery environment).

Name: Reset File Permissions
Description: Resets default Windows system folder access control list permissions (via secedit).

Name: Reset Registry Permissions
Description: Resets core HKLM and HKCU registry key permissions back to standard default templates.
